summary: BLOCK 442 Test Listing Filter Guard - All tests pass. Backend APIs (12/12) and Frontend UI components verified working correctly.

BACKEND VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/test-listings returns all flagged test listings (admin only, returns 403 for non-admin)
BACKEND VERIFIED: GET /api/listings excludes is_test_listing:true for non-admin users
BACKEND VERIFIED: GET /api/listings works correctly for admin users
BACKEND VERIFIED: is_test_listing field is included in ListingResponse model

BACKEND VERIFIED: ISO matches filter excludes test listings (line 537 in honeypot.py)
BACKEND VERIFIED: Similar listings filter excludes test listings (line 574 in honeypot.py)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 442 Test Listing Filter Guard fully tested. Backend endpoints verified: PATCH /api/listings/{id}/test-flag (admin-only toggle), GET /api/admin/test-listings (admin-only list of flagged), GET /api/listings (filters test listings from non-admin). Frontend verified: ListingDetailModal shows TEST banner with CTA hidden, ListingCard shows TEST badge, Admin Panel has TestListingsSection with search and flag/unflag functionality. Note: Admin user has is_hidden:true which also hides their listings via hidden_user filter, but test_listing filter works independently.

backend_patch_test_flag_non_admin_403.details: Non-admin user receives 403 when trying to toggle test flag
